core.label: Julia Fundamentals
core.description: Syntax, types, arrays, and the REPL.

topics.label: Installation & REPL
topics.description: Install Julia and use the interactive REPL with help (?), shell (;), and package (]) modes.

topics.label: Variables & Types
topics.description: Int64, Float64, String, Bool, Char. Julia is dynamically typed with optional type annotations.

topics.label: Arrays & Matrices
topics.description: N-dimensional arrays with 1-based indexing. Arrays are Julia's core data structure for numerical work.

topics.label: Control Flow
topics.description: if/elseif/else/end, for, while, begin/end blocks. Loops are fast in Julia (unlike Python/R).

topics.label: Functions
topics.description: Single-line and multi-line functions, multiple dispatch, anonymous functions. Multiple dispatch is Julia's key feature.

topics.label: Strings
topics.description: String interpolation ($), multi-line strings, regex. Strings are UTF-8 encoded.

topics.label: Dictionaries & Sets
topics.description: Dict for key-value pairs, Set for unique elements. Similar to Python's dict and set.

topics.label: Broadcasting (.)
topics.description: Apply functions element-wise with dot syntax (f.(x)). Broadcasting avoids explicit loops.

topics.label: Comprehensions
topics.description: Array and generator comprehensions for concise array creation. Similar to Python but with type annotations.

core.label: Type System & Multiple Dispatch
core.description: Julia's type hierarchy, abstract types, and dispatch.

topics.label: Type Hierarchy
topics.description: Abstract types, concrete types, and the Any/Number/Integer hierarchy. Julia's types form a tree.

topics.label: Multiple Dispatch
topics.description: Define methods specialized on argument types. Julia dispatches on all argument types, not just the first.

topics.label: Structs
topics.description: Define composite types with struct (immutable) and mutable struct. Julia's primary data modeling tool.

topics.label: Parametric Types
topics.description: Generic types with type parameters. Array{Float64, 2} is a 2D array of Float64.

topics.label: Error Handling
topics.description: try/catch/finally, throw, and custom exception types.

topics.label: Modules & Packages
topics.description: Organize code with module and manage dependencies with Pkg.

topics.label: Macros
topics.description: Metaprogramming with @macro syntax. Julia macros transform code at parse time.

topics.label: Performance & @benchmark
topics.description: Write fast code with type stability, avoid globals, and profile with BenchmarkTools.

core.label: I/O, Testing & Ecosystem
core.description: File I/O, plotting, testing, and the Julia ecosystem.

topics.label: File I/O
topics.description: Read and write files with open, readline, readlines, write. CSV.jl for CSV data.

topics.label: DataFrames.jl
topics.description: Tabular data manipulation similar to R/Pandas. The core data science package.

topics.label: Plotting (Plots.jl / Makie.jl)
topics.description: Create visualizations with Plots.jl (multiple backends) or Makie.jl (GPU-accelerated).

topics.label: Testing
topics.description: Write tests with @test, @testset from the Test standard library.

topics.label: Linear Algebra
topics.description: Built-in LinearAlgebra — eigvals, svd, lu, qr, norm. Julia is designed for numerical computing.

topics.label: Parallel & Distributed
topics.description: Threads, @distributed, pmap, and Distributed.jl. Julia supports easy parallelism.

topics.label: Calling Python/R/C
topics.description: PyCall.jl, RCall.jl, and ccall for seamless interop with other languages.
